entry.title: APP DEVELOPMENT CURRICULUM
entry.summary:
Apple launches app development curriculum for high school and community college students.

Code4Future will work with them to get it rolled out to the community.
entry.content:
Apple launches app development curriculum for high school and community college students.

Code4Future will work with them to get it rolled out to the community.

entry.title: WHY – CODE IS A LANGUAGE
entry.summary: Code is another form of communication, a language. Learning to program is just like learning any other language. The earlier you start, the easier it is.
entry.content: Code is another form of communication, a language. Learning to program is just like learning any other language. The earlier you start, the easier it is.
